blended.narrative: Whistler Blackcomb is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 9 inches of wet, heavy snow expected. Snow levels around 2,274 ft. Looking ahead, 17 inches possible over the next 14 days.

Monday: 3.2" of snow, highs of 39°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
